<path>/var/repos/oxIDIZER/crates/webservice/ox_webservice_ping/systems_tests/100003-WebSocket-IPv6/test.sh</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: #!/bin/bash
2: 
3: # Exit codes
4: PASSED=0
5: FAILED=255
6: SKIPPED=77
7: 
8: # Parameters
9: DEFAULT_LOGGING_LEVEL="info"
10: DEFAULT_MODE="isolated"
11: DEFAULT_TEST_LIBS_DIR=$(dirname "$0")/../../../../../tests/common
12: 
13: SCRIPTS_DIR=$1
14: TEST_LIBS_DIR=${2:-$DEFAULT_TEST_LIBS_DIR}
15: MODE=${3:-$DEFAULT_MODE}
16: LOGGING_LEVEL=${4:-$DEFAULT_LOGGING_LEVEL}
17: TARGET=${5:-"debug"}
18: PORTS_STR=${6:-"3000 3001 3002 3003 3004"}
19: read -r -a PORTS <<< "$PORTS_STR"
20: BASE_PORT=${PORTS[0]}
21: 
22: source "$TEST_LIBS_DIR/log_function.sh"
23: 
24: TEST_DIR=$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0")")
25: 
26: if [ "$MODE" == "integrated" ]; then
27:   log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "info" "Skipping test in integrated mode."
28:   exit $SKIPPED
29: fi
30: 
31: # Skip if IPv6 loopback is not available
32: if ! ip -6 addr show lo 2>/dev/null | grep -q "::1"; then
33:   log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "info" "Skipping: IPv6 loopback (::1) not available on this system."
34:   exit $SKIPPED
35: fi
36: 
37: if [ "$MODE" == "isolated" ]; then
38:   TEST_PID_FILE="$TEST_DIR/ox_webservice.pid"
39:   TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR="/var/repos/oxIDIZER"
40: 
41:   mkdir -p "$TEST_DIR/conf" "$TEST_DIR/logs"
42:   cat <<EOF > "$TEST_DIR/conf/ox_webservice.runtime.yaml"
43: merge: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/conf/service/active/base.yaml"
44: 
45: log4rs_config: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/conf/log4rs.yaml"
46: 
47: modules:
48:   - id: ping_module
49:     name: ox_webservice_ping
50:     path: "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR/target/$TARGET/libox_webservice_ping.so"
51:     phase: Content
52: 
53: servers:
54:   - protocol: http
55:     port: $BASE_PORT
56:     bind_address: "::1"
57:     hosts:
58:       - name: "localhost"
59: 
60: routes:
61:   - url: "^/ping"
62:     module_id: ping_module
63:     priority: 100
64: EOF
65: 
66:   "$SCRIPTS_DIR/start_server.sh" \
67:     "$LOGGING_LEVEL" \
68:     "$TARGET" \
69:     "$TEST_DIR/conf/ox_webservice.runtime.yaml" \
70:     "$TEST_DIR/logs/ox_webservice.log" \
71:     "$TEST_PID_FILE" \
72:     "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR"
73: 
74:   sleep 2
75: 
76:   if [ ! -d "$TEST_DIR/venv" ]; then
77:     python3 -m venv "$TEST_DIR/venv"
78:     "$TEST_DIR/venv/bin/pip" install websockets --quiet
79:   fi
80: 
81:   PYTHON_OUTPUT=$("$TEST_DIR/venv/bin/python3" "$TEST_DIR/ws_ping_client.py" "$BASE_PORT" "::1" 2>&1)
82:   PYTHON_EXIT_CODE=$?
83: 
84:   "$SCRIPTS_DIR/stop_server.sh" "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "$TEST_PID_FILE" "$TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR"
85: 
86:   if [ "$LOGGING_LEVEL" == "debug" ]; then
87:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "Server Logs:"
88:     cat "$TEST_DIR/logs/ox_webservice.log" | while read -r line; do log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "  $line"; done
89:   fi
90: 
91:   if [ $PYTHON_EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
92:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "notice" "WebSocket IPv6 ping test PASSED"
93:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "debug" "Client output: $PYTHON_OUTPUT"
94:     exit $PASSED
95:   else
96:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "WebSocket IPv6 ping test FAILED"
97:     log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "Client output: $PYTHON_OUTPUT"
98:     exit $FAILED
99:   fi
100: fi
101: 
102: log_message "$LOGGING_LEVEL" "error" "Invalid mode: $MODE"
103: exit $FAILED

(End of file - total 103 lines)
